Tessera thermostats work with most 24-volt forced-air heating and cooling
systems, including conventional gas, oil, and electric furnaces, central air
conditioning, and standard heat pumps. A C-wire is required; if your wall
has only R, W, Y, and G wires, the included power adapter can substitute.
Tessera does not currently support millivolt systems, line-voltage baseboard
heat, or proprietary communicating systems from Carrier Infinity, Lennox
iComfort, or Trane ComfortLink. Check the in-app compatibility checker
before ordering if you are unsure.
